{{CargoRelic
|name=Wheel of Taranis
|class_id=22060
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=01-15
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Jan 15, 236 BC, Taranis gained the power to control the alternation of day and night through this wheel.<br>This wheel is the property of Taranis. He is known as Thundos in ancient Celtic mythology and is worshiped as a patron saint by many people together with Esus and Toutatis. According to legend, it controls the alternation of day and night, and it is one of Taranis's important symbols.
|fame=22
|art=34
|fth=46
|civ=21
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +1
|ss2=Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss3=Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss4=Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5
|ss7=Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5<br>Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail DEF +20
}}
